title: Turing Scheme funding outcomes 2021 to 2022
body: "The outcomes of applications to the Turing Scheme for the 2021 to 2022 academic year detailing the allocation of funds for international study and work placements to successful applicants.  The report provides an overview of the data broken down by various factors including:   nation demographic destination country   The allocations data spreadsheet provides a more detailed breakdown of the information.  The data includes both planned and actual use of the funding allocated.  An evaluation report of the first year Turing Scheme: Year 1 evaluation, looked at how well the scheme was implemented; and the short and medium-term outcomes for providers and participants.  Programme materials from this year are available on the National Archives at Turing Scheme: manage your project. "
